description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a faceted, slightly polygonal body and a single, rounded handle attached to one side. The cup features the name 'ALBERT' printed in a decorative black font on its exterior surface, adding a personalized touch. The rim is wide and circular, while the base tapers slightly, giving the cup a stable stance. The surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and emphasizing its clean, modern appearance. The interior is plain and matches the exterior in color and finish. The handle is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping, making it suitable for holding hot or cold beverages.
description: A glossy white ceramic cup with a faceted body, rounded handle, and the name 'ALBERT' printed in black decorative font.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'ALBERT' text and the handle on the right side.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered and no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and no visible text.
description_view_3: Angled view showing a partial glimpse of the 'ALBERT' text and the plain surface.
